title: Short Term Operating Reserve (STOR) day ahead buy curve
description: As part of Clean Energy Package (CEP) 6.9, we will be running daily auction for procurement of STOR. The buy curve used in the daily assessment process is available here. ** NOTE: ** STOR DA has been officially decommissioned following the launch of the new Slow Reserve service in EAC. The final STOR DA tender was run on 30th March, marking the end of its operations. Additionally, the last hash file was uploaded on 29th March, which was the final file submitted to the data portal.
